scripts.setup: : "${CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH:?Missing CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH}" && : "${CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE_PATH:?Missing CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE_PATH}" && cd "$CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE_PATH" && cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env" . && cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/packages/scripts/.env.production" ./packages/scripts && cp -r "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/viewer/src/test/.auth" apps/viewer/src/test/.auth && mkdir -p .agents/skills .claude/skills && cp -R "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.agents/skills/." .agents/skills && cp -R "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.claude/skills/." .claude/skills && bun install && bunx nx build @typebot.io/react
